title: The Gay Deception
writer: Stephen Morehouse Avery, Don Hartman, Patterson McNutt
actors: Francis Lederer, Frances Dee, Benita Hume
plot: Mirabel wins a $5, 000 lottery which will enable her to live like a queen in New York. There she meets Sandro, a bellboy who is really a prince, so she does get to be a queen after all.
